Details: One bench-scale study showed effective degradation of terbufos by UV irradiation in the presence of TiO2 particles. Removals ranged from 70 percent to up to >99 percent. The degradation was influenced by the pH and TiO2 dose. Alkaline pH and initial TiO2 concentrations of 0.5 to 1 g/L were favorable for the degradation of terbufos.
